news.headline: Arsenal seek to end 20-year wait for Champions League final in showdown with Atletico
news.summary: Arsenal will be seeking to end a 20-year wait when they face off against Atletico Madrid Tuesday as they aim to reach the Champions League final for the first time since 2006. news.headline: Ukraine's Zelensky slams Russian 'cynicism' ahead of separate truces
news.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky on Tuesday accused Russia of "utter cynicism" for launching deadly attacks while also seeking a truce to stage its May 9 Victory Day parade in Moscow. news.summary: With an estimated 3 to 4 million nationals, the Malian community in the Ivory Coast is one of the largest in the country. news.headline: Smotrich says he promised his son ‘more destruction’ in Lebanon
news.summary: Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich said he promised his son there would be ‘more destruction’ in Lebanon.

news.headline: Prominent cleric Muhammad Idrees gunned down in KP's Charsadda
news.summary:
<p>CHARSADDA: Renowned cleric and former Jamiat Ulema-i-Islam-Fazl (JUI-F) MPA Maulana Muhammad Idrees was killed on Tuesday after unidentified assailants opened fire on him, police said.</p>
